specs.title: cp-000: Gamma-toolbar title edits commit only when the trimmed draft is non-empty and ch
cp-001: Pressing Escape in gamma-toolbar title edit restores the original title and exit
cp-002: Gamma-toolbar save dot uses titlestatus idle saved status for its native tooltip
cp-003: Gamma-toolbar card count uses singularplural card wording automatically
cp-004: Theme dropdown in gamma toolbar is click-open with click-outside dismissal handl
cp-005: Theme dropdown width is fixed at 320px
cp-006: Export dropdown in gamma toolbar is click-open with click-outside dismissal hand
cp-007: Gamma export button swaps to a spinner and Exporting while any export is in prog
cp-008: Gamma export failure surfaces via alertmsg rather than inline panel error UI
cp-009: Continue in Slides Mode always closes the export dropdown before showing the bro
cp-010: Switching from Gamma to Slides mode requires confirming the exact prompt Switch
cp-011: Gamma toolbar Agent button toggles agentPanelOpen in store and changes styling b
cp-012: Gamma toolbar Present button uses a filled Play icon and sets isPresenting true
cp-013: OutlineGenerator step names are prompt outline theme and generating
cp-014: Outline-generator prompt step starts with cardCount 8 audience general and selec
cp-015: Prompt-step title label includes a visible red asterisk for required input
cp-016: Pressing Enter in the outline-generator title input triggers handleGenerateOutli
cp-017: Prompt-step audience picker renders ten audience options in a 5-column grid
cp-018: Prompt-step audience icons switch to duotone weight only for the active audience
cp-019: Prompt-step card-count slider allows values from 3 to 20
cp-020: Generate-outline CTA label changes to Generating outline while the outline reque
cp-021: Successful outline generation immediately persists audience to the slides store
cp-022: Outline-generation failures remain on the prompt step and show the returned or f
cp-023: Outline editor header shows live card count with singularplural text
cp-024: Outline cards use hover-revealed move-up move-down and remove controls in the to
cp-025: Outline-card remove button is disabled when there is only one outline card left
cp-026: Outline-card titles are plain inputs with placeholder Card title
cp-027: Outline-card bullet inputs use placeholder Key point
cp-028: Outline-card Add point appends an empty bullet string to the current card
cp-029: Outline-step Add another card appends a new card titled New Card with one bullet
cp-030: Outline-step Back clears any prior error text before returning to the prompt ste
cp-031: Outline-step Choose Theme is disabled when the outline array is empty
cp-032: Theme-selection step renders every key from PRESET_THEMES not a limited subset
cp-033: Selected theme in ThemeSwatchLarge shows a brand check badge in the top-right co
